notes: Synthesized from adaptor surface; testing is a dev/test harness with no external vendor API. Its real surface is minimal: version() plus fn/combine/log re-exported from @openfn/language-common. Modelled each operation as an httpbin-style endpoint (fn, combine, log, version, get/post echo, status simulation) against a localhost:4010 mock placeholder so the mocker has a concrete surface. Schemas (State, LogRequest, LogEntry, Version, EchoResponse, StatusResponse) are invented; no real endpoints, paths, auth, or field names exist upstream.
